assertions: Exactly nine image-backed pins are assessed once each using both metadata and image evidence.
Each configured query receives a relevance count, verdict, and replacement query.
At least six relevant pins produce exactly three evidence-linked concepts.
Fewer than six relevant pins produce zero concepts and an insufficient-evidence report.
Recommendations cite only pins assessed relevant; all other citations use supplied pin IDs.
Notion separates observations from recommendations and embeds five source images with Pinterest links.
The first execution is a baseline and makes no week-over-week movement claims.
Google Sheets receives sortable date-time and numeric rank fields without duplicate Snapshot keys.
The durable snapshot is committed only after Google Sheets and Notion both succeed.
